local_clone_commands: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/kubernetes/api.git api && cd api && git fetch --depth 1 origin f32ed1d60cf0787a512bebd6c06a4b84ae0b7cc7 && git checkout f32ed1d60cf0787a512bebd6c06a4b84ae0b7cc7

git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/kubernetes/apimachinery.git apimachinery && cd apimachinery && git fetch --depth 1 origin b2e9f88ff6d4c50c13061a53b1239c7707354eda && git checkout b2e9f88ff6d4c50c13061a53b1239c7707354eda
dependency_hints: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates python3 python3-pip jq && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
